name: hermes-action
description: Delegate real-world actions (research, browser, messaging, scheduling, Hermes skills/tools) to Hermes Agent.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate real-world actions to Hermes Agent
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex delegate work outside the local coding session — research, browser workflows, messaging, scheduling, and any Hermes skill or tool — to Hermes Agent, instead of reimplementing them. Conservative safety policy (risky execute -> request-approval). Requires Hermes Agent installed locally.
defaultPrompt: Ask Hermes for a safe plan to handle the next real-world action from this repo's context.
